name: launch-operations-exam
title: Launch operations certification
intro: A timed exam for mission operators. It demonstrates attempts, pass score, certificate, progress, randomization, and lead capture.

result_messages.title: Not certified yet
result_messages.text: Review launch constraints and retry the exam.

result_messages.title: Mission certified
result_messages.text: You passed. Your launch operations certificate is ready.

questions.text: A launch weather hold is most likely triggered by...
questions.explanation: Lightning, high winds, and unsafe cloud conditions can violate launch commit criteria.

options.label: Lightning risk near the launch corridor

questions.text: Which checks belong in a final go/no-go poll?
A countdown can continue after a red-line limit is exceeded if the audience is already watching.
What short phrase means the team is approved to proceed?
Why are launch windows sometimes only a few minutes long?

options.label: The spacecraft must meet a moving orbital target
The rocket fuel disappears after five minutes
The launch pad rotates independently from Earth
